channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte and Public Interest
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, highlighting the lack of public engagement compared to past trials of President Joseph Estrada and Chief Justice Ren...

item.title: Art Exhibition Explores Diverse Interpretations of the Body Through Seven Artists' Works
item.description: The Bodies We Carry art exhibition in Thiruvananthapuram, organized by Triva, explores multifaceted interpretations of the human body through the works of seven artists. Curated by filmmaker Sreekrish...

item.title: Kebbi State Government to Sponsor 300 Couples in Mass Wedding Ceremony
item.description: The Kebbi State Government has finalized plans to sponsor 300 couples in its third mass wedding program. Chairman of the Mass Wedding Committee, Alhaji Suleiman Muhammad Argungu, revealed this during ...

item.title: Astronauts Successfully Capture First X-Rays in Orbit, Advancing Space Medicine
item.description: Astronauts on SpaceX's Fram2 mission have achieved a groundbreaking milestone by capturing diagnostic X-ray images in orbit for the first time. This development provides space medicine with a second i...

item.title: Fact-Checker Disputes Trump and Cruz's Claims About Inflation Decline
item.description: President Donald Trump celebrated a reported drop in U.S. inflation rates on Truth Social, claiming his administration had reduced the annual rate to 3.5% in June. However, political commentator Andy ...

item.title: Senior Radio Technician Killed in Ambush
item.description: A 56-year-old senior technician of a Catholic radio station, Dennis Pido, was killed in a brutal ambush on July 14, 2026, while riding his motorcycle to work. The incident occurred in Barangay Limbo, ...

item.title: Nine-year-old girl dies after getting trapped in drainage pipe at Lahore water park
item.description: A nine-year-old girl died after allegedly getting trapped in a drainage pipe at a private water park in Lahore, prompting authorities to seal the facility. The incident occurred when park officials re...

item.title: China's Economy Faces Slow Growth Amid Structural Challenges and Geopolitical Uncertainty
item.description: China's economy expanded by 4.3% in the second quarter of 2026, marking its slowest growth since 2022. This follows structural issues and geopolitical tensions that have hindered domestic consumption ...

item.title: AI as a Collaborative Tool for Youth in Modern Workforce
item.description: Experts emphasize that young professionals should view artificial intelligence (AI) as a collaborative tool rather than a career threat. While AI advancements have raised concerns about job security, ...

item.title: Yobe State Expands Healthcare Access for Retired Civil Servants
item.description: The Yobe State Government has approved the enrollment of retired state and local government civil servants into its Social Equity Programme to expand access to quality healthcare for pensioners. Dr. B...

item.title: U.S. Launches New Wave of Attacks on Iran Following Trump's Threats
item.description: The U.S. military has initiated a fresh wave of strikes against Iran, following overnight attacks that targeted dozens of military facilities. This comes after President Donald Trump warned of potenti...

item.title: Royal family's alleged secret warnings about Meghan Markle revealed

item.title: Vanguard 1: The Longest Surviving Satellite in Earth's Orbit
item.description: Vanguard 1, a satellite launched in 1958, remains the oldest human-made object still orbiting Earth. Despite being only 16.3 centimeters in diameter and weighing 1.5 kilograms, it has endured for over...

item.title: Celebrity Estate Details Revealed After Passing
item.description: The article discusses the estate of Daveigh Chase, a former actress known for her role in 'The Ring.' Following her passing, her family has been managing a substantial inheritance worth six figures. T...

item.title: Comelec Receives Two COCs for Dasmariñas Special Polls
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has received two certificates of candidacies (COCs) for the special elections in Dasmariñas City, Cavite, which are scheduled for August 29, 2026. The filing peri...

item.title: Call for Review of MP Security Following Ann Widdecombe's Death and Political Security Debates
item.description: Andy Burnham, former Greater Manchester mayor and expected to become prime minister, has called for a serious review of MPs' security following the death of Ann Widdecombe, a Reform UK spokeswoman and...

item.title: Ontario government rejects FOI request on speed camera studies under new transparency laws
item.description: The Ontario government has rejected a freedom of information request seeking studies on the effectiveness of speed cameras, citing changes to transparency laws that exempt cabinet ministers and their ...

item.title: Attorney General Todd Blanche Faces Scrutiny Over Epstein File Release and DOJ Mishandling

item.title: Kinetiko aims to accelerate South African gas production amid national shortage concerns
item.description: Australian company Kinetiko is pursuing a dual permitting strategy to expedite gas production at its Brakfontein project in South Africa, aiming to address looming energy shortages. The executive chai...
